summary: Created src/input/pointer.ts with PointerState interface and initPointer() function that tracks normalized pointer position (0-1 viewport space), derives dx/dy/speed from consecutive moves, tracks active state via pointerenter/pointerleave, uses Pointer Events API for unified mouse+touch, persists no history, and returns frozen snapshots. Wired initPointer(canvas) into src/main.ts. Created tests/pointer.test.ts with 14 tests covering all acceptance criteria: position tracking, velocity derivation, mouse+touch support, viewport normalization/clamping, destroy cleanup, snapshot immutability, and privacy checks (no localStorage/sessionStorage/cookies/indexedDB).
